### III. | INTERDISCIPLINARY DOMAINS

Each project or artist ID can become the basis for a course or creative research field:

| ID/PROJECT | POSSIBLE COURSE | FIELD CROSSOVER |
|-----------------|------------------|----------------------------------------|
| `::MET4morfoses`| MythOS & Machine | Religion, Story Design, AI Theology |
| `::GR1ND3R` | Memory as Horror | Media Studies, Narrative Psychology |
| `::Q_v33R` | Voice & Catharsis| Queer Theory, Nonfiction Writing |
| `::ETCETER4` | Sound & Self | Sonic Poetics, Performance Studies |
| `::FLOAT1NG.P01NTS`| Seeing in Layers | Visual Semiotics, Motion Design |
| `::KONS0L/ANN.ARKIV`| Research Engines | Archive Science, Cultural Theory |
| `::DR34M.L0G1K` | Dream Language UI | Cognitive Design, Symbolic Systems |
